hooks.command: cd "/Users/rianderson/Documents/Projetos/AVU" && git add -A && if git diff --cached --quiet; then true; else MSG="Auto-update $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; if git commit -q -m "$MSG" && git push -q origin main; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Committed and pushed to GitHub (gestao-avu): $MSG\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Auto-commit created locally but push to GitHub failed - check git status/credentials.\"}"; fi; fi
